entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., a cereal crop grown in Sahelian conditions

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: A lack of water availability during the growth stages of the crop

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and increase in size of the plant

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological events in the plant life cycle, such as flowering

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural output of the crop

entities.name: SAHELIAN CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characteristic of the Sahel region, including specific rainfall and temperature patterns

entities.name: BIOMASS PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total mass of biological material produced by the plant

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: TILLER FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of side shoots (tillers) to produce viable grains

entities.name: S30
entities.description: Water deficit occurring prior to flowering

entities.name: S45
entities.description: Water deficit occurring at the beginning of flowering

entities.name: S60
entities.description: Water deficit occurring at the end of flowering

entities.name: CONTROL IRRIGATION TREATMENT
entities.description: An irrigation method simulating the natural distribution of rainfall throughout the cropping season

entities.name: PANICLE INITIATION
entities.description: The stage where the flower cluster (panicle) begins to form

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The capacity of the crop to withstand or recover from water deficit

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: The biogeographic zone of transition in Africa between the Sahara Desert to the north and the Sudanian savanna to the south

entities.name: WATER REGIME
entities.description: The pattern and amount of water availability in the soil

entities.name: CROP DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants grown per unit of land area
